title: EvaluationReport
description: Structured output from harness evaluate — one GateFailure per violation, fully machine-parseable so agents can iterate on specific issues without human intervention.

passed.description: True only when every gate passes (no failures or errors).

gate_results.description: Ordered results for every gate that was run.

failures.description: Flat list of all GateFailure objects across every gate — convenience field for agent consumption.

Severity.description: How blocking a failure is: error blocks the PR; warning is advisory; info is purely informational.

GateId.description: Stable identifier for each built-in evaluation gate.

GateStatus.description: passed = all checks green; failed = at least one GateFailure; skipped = gate disabled in config; error = gate itself threw an exception.

GateFailure.description: A single actionable violation produced by a gate.  All fields are required so agents can locate, understand, and fix the issue without further lookups.

message.description: Human-readable (and agent-readable) description of what failed.

file_path.description: Repo-relative path to the offending file, or null when the failure is not file-specific.

line_number.description: 1-based line number in file_path, or null when not applicable.

suggestion.description: Concrete, agent-actionable fix suggestion.  Should be specific enough that an agent can act on it without human intervention in >90% of cases.

rule_id.description: Optional linter/checker rule identifier (e.g. 'E501', 'no-unused-vars') for cross-referencing tool docs.

context.description: Optional short code snippet or diff excerpt providing additional context.

GateResult.description: Result for a single gate — progressive disclosure: read status first, then drill into failures only when needed.

duration_ms.description: Wall-clock time the gate took to run.

failures.description: All GateFailure objects produced by this gate.

message.description: Short human-readable summary for this gate (e.g. 'Coverage 87.3% < required 90%').

EvaluationSummary.description: Top-level counts for quick agent assessment without loading every failure.

total_failures.description: Sum of all GateFailure objects (all severities).

blocking_failures.description: GateFailures with severity=error — the ones agents must fix before opening a PR.

ReportMetadata.description: Provenance information embedded in every report for staleness detection and telemetry.
